releases.notes: Cloud-readiness hardening, OpenAPI exposure, Grafana monitoring assets, structured deployment checklist, and production deployment verification improvements.
Admin settings drafts now survive tab switches and window refocus without wiping unsaved form input.
Storefront theme consistency fixes, fresh-store appearance reset hardening, Yalidine local wilaya sync, and verified Meta CAPI delivery.
Hardened client store provisioning defaults and blocked stepdz-test tags from entering client deployment flow.
Trusted version metadata, lighter admin version badge, mobile admin polish, and load-more pagination on the storefront.
Shipping labels, appearance fixes, add-product image UX, and unpublished default pages for new stores.
